title: LookAtMyStuff
description: Renders a players tools on them
body:
if a player has any of the following in their inventory, this mod renders them on the players model
- swords (main side)
- pickaxe/axe/shovel/hoe (off side)
- compass (front left)
- clock (front right)
- bow (back, over the neck)
- shield (back)
- fishing rod (back, under shield)
- flint and steel (back, waist)
- spyglass (back, waist)
